reasoning: The SOC2 control CC5.2 focuses on developing control activities over technology to support objectives, which aligns with ensuring proper logging, access control, and network security in Kubernetes. Audit logging ensures that changes and access are tracked, while network policies and RBAC ensure that access and network traffic are controlled and restricted according to the principle of least privilege.
title: CC5.2 COSO Principle 11: The entity also selects and develops general control activities over technology to support the achievement of objectives
